macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: US Justice Department Drops Probe into Fed Chair Jerome Powell
items.summary: The US Justice Department has dropped its investigation into Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell, related to Fed renovations or other matters, easing potential drama around the Fed leadership. This development comes amid ongoing economic uncertainties.

items.title: US Unemployment Claims Rise to 214,000 in April Amid Labor Market Uncertainty
items.summary: New US unemployment claims reached 214,000 in April, signaling an 'uncertainty' test for the labor market. This reflects mixed economic signals with high PMI but low consumer confidence.

items.title: Gallup Poll: 47% of Americans Rate Economy as 'Poor,' 73% Say It's Worsening
items.summary: Nearly half of Americans (47%) describe current economic conditions as 'poor,' up 7 points from March, with 73% believing the economy is deteriorating. The Gallup Economic Confidence Index fell to -38, the lowest since November 2023.

items.title: US Treasury Sanctions Chinese Refinery Hengli for Iranian Oil Purchases
items.summary: The US Treasury's 'Economic Fury' action sanctioned China-based Hengli Petrochemical for buying billions in Iranian oil, targeting Iran's petroleum sector and shadow fleet to curb aggression and nuclear activities.

items.title: Comex Gold Drops $53/oz, Silver Down $3.7/oz Amid Oil Rebound
items.summary: Gold and silver prices fell with Comex gold down $53 per ounce and silver down $3.7 per ounce, influenced by an oil rebound and focus on Fed outlook amid Iran tensions.

items.title: Economists Predict Dire Inflation Amid Iran War Tensions
items.summary: Economists warn of worsening inflation due to the Iran war, with calls for the Fed to respond to oil shocks to build credibility. Gold gains on Iran talks optimism.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Bitcoin Consolidates Near $77,590 Amid Market Uncertainty
items.summary: Bitcoin traded between $77,264 and $78,479 over the past 24 hours, currently at $77,590 (up 0.12%). The cryptocurrency is pressing against key overhead resistance as the market awaits clear directional signals.

items.title: Crypto Market Sees $185 Million in Liquidations
items.summary: The cryptocurrency market experienced $185 million in total liquidations in the past 24 hours, affecting 99,824 traders. Bitcoin liquidations reached $14.4 million and Ethereum $10.1 million, with the largest single liquidation at $4.7 million on Binance's BTC-USDT pair.

items.title: Altcoins Show Mixed Performance With Notable Gainers
items.summary: Algorand, Cosmos Hub, and Zcash led gains with increases of 5.71%, 5.17%, and 4.63% respectively, while some altcoins like Stable declined 13.17% over the period.

items.title: Bitcoin 'Sharks' Accumulate Amid Market Consolidation
items.summary: Large traders are quietly accumulating Bitcoin positions as the market experiences minimal price action, with Bitcoin declining 0.9% over the past 24 hours following a relatively flat trading week.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Tencent Releases Hy3 Preview and Ling 2.6 Flash AI Models
items.summary: Tencent unveiled Hy3 preview, a high-efficiency Mixture-of-Experts model for agentic workflows with configurable reasoning levels, and Ling-2.6-1T, a trillion-parameter instant model using 'fast thinking' to cut costs while maintaining top performance.[2]

items.title: ComfyUI Raises $30M at $500M Valuation for Open-Source AI Infrastructure
items.summary: ComfyUI announced a $30M financing round led by Craft Ventures, bringing total funding to $47M, to develop open-source AI tools for creative professionals.[5]

items.title: Intel Reports Strong AI-Driven Data Center Revenue Beat
items.summary: Intel's data center segment generated $5.1B in quarterly revenue, exceeding expectations, with CEO Lip-Bu Tan highlighting the shift to inference and agentic AI boosting demand for Intel CPUs and packaging.[3]

items.title: America's Largest AI Robot Data Factory Opens in Watertown, Massachusetts
items.summary: Tutor Intelligence launched Data Factory One, the largest AI robot data facility in the US, training robots on simple human tasks like a 'kindergarten for robots'.[1]

items.title: Thrive Launches Thrive Eternal AI Initiative
items.summary: Thrive announced the launch of Thrive Eternal, a major new AI project amid discussions on industry developments including Cursor's SpaceX deal.[3]

items.title: Tech Industry Layoffs Surge, Impacting AI and Machine Learning Workers
items.summary: Mounting layoffs across tech, including recent Meta cuts, are leaving thousands jobless in a crowded market, straining workers in AI-related fields.[6]
items.source: KPIX CBS NEWS BAY AREA via YouTube

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Biggest Game Releases of May 2026 Announced
items.summary: May 2026 features major releases including Forza Horizon 6, Indiana Jones and the Great Circle on Switch 2, LEGO Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight, 007: First Light, and Lumentale: Memories of Trey.

items.title: This Week in Fighting Game News Covers Multiple Updates
items.summary: Recent fighting game developments include Street Fighter 6, Dragon Ball FighterZ, Invincible Vs. open beta recap, 2XKO, Avatar Legends, and Guilty Gear Strive, with Riot boosting prize pools for EVO and Battle Coliseum to $75,000.

items.title: Black Desert Online April 24 Glab Patch Introduces Massive Updates
items.summary: The April 24th BDO Glab patch brings huge PvP updates, AoS changes, class balance, node wars return including two-hour sessions, and Siege rework.

items.title: Clash of Clans Update Sneak Peek Reveals New Troops and Features
items.summary: New update includes troop and defense level increases, Sky Wagon Siege Machine, Logger Guardian, Electro Fangs Equipment, ranked mode improvements, and new leagues for CWL.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: NASA's Curiosity Rover Discovers Most Diverse Organic Molecules On Mars
items.summary: NASA's Curiosity Rover has discovered the most diverse organic molecules ever found on Mars, raising hopes of ancient life and providing guidance for future planetary missions.

items.title: NASA Shuts Off Key Instrument On Voyager 1 To Extend Mission
items.summary: NASA has shut off a key instrument on Voyager 1 that measured low-energy charged particles to preserve power and keep humanity's first interstellar explorer operational.

items.title: Robot Defeats Elite Table Tennis Players In Real Time
items.summary: A breakthrough robot has demonstrated the ability to defeat elite table tennis players in real-time competition, marking a significant advancement in physical AI applications.

items.title: Security Researchers Uncover Two Spying Campaigns Exploiting Telecom Infrastructure
items.summary: Citizen Lab has detailed two separate spying campaigns abusing weaknesses in SS7 and Diameter protocols across 2G, 3G, 4G, and 5G networks to track people's locations.
